title: Qubit Calibration Protocols
description: Master the essential calibration experiments for superconducting qubits: spectroscopy, Rabi, Ramsey, and T1/T2 measurements. Learn systematic procedures for tuning pulse parameters and maintaining gate fidelity.
learningObjectives: Design and analyze qubit spectroscopy experiments to find resonance frequencies
Implement Rabi calibration to determine pulse amplitudes for specific rotations
Use Ramsey experiments for precise frequency calibration and T2* measurement
Perform T1 measurements to characterize energy relaxation
Develop systematic calibration workflows for maintaining gate performance
